project_summary: This WBS outlines the 12-week development plan for the Task Management System, focusing on User Management, Task Management, and Collaboration modules using a Node.js/React/PostgreSQL stack. The plan covers 20 critical tasks distributed across backend, frontend, database, QA, and DevOps agents to meet all functional and non-functional requirements within the 5-person team constraint.

tasks.title: Design and create Users, Tasks, Shares, and Comments tables
tasks.description: Create PostgreSQL schema with proper indexing for users, tasks, task_shares, and comments tables. Implement constraints for foreign keys and unique email addresses.
acceptance_criteria: Database schema deployed to dev environment with all tables, indexes, and constraints verified via migration scripts.

tasks.title: Implement User Registration API with bcrypt hashing
tasks.description: Create POST /api/auth/register endpoint. Validate email format and password strength. Hash password using bcrypt (salt factor >= 12) and store user in DB.
acceptance_criteria: API accepts valid registration data, stores hashed password, and returns 201 status; rejects duplicates and weak passwords.

tasks.title: Implement User Login and JWT generation
tasks.description: Create POST /api/auth/login endpoint. Verify credentials against bcrypt hash. Generate and return JWT token with user ID.
acceptance_criteria: Valid credentials return JWT token; invalid credentials return 401 error.

tasks.title: Implement Password Reset flow with SendGrid
tasks.description: Create endpoints for reset request and reset execution. Integrate SendGrid (INT-001) to send time-limited tokens. Validate token and update password with bcrypt.
acceptance_criteria: Reset email sent via SendGrid; token validation works; password updated securely; expired tokens rejected.

tasks.title: Implement User Profile and S3 Avatar Upload
tasks.description: Create GET/PUT /api/users/me endpoints. Integrate AWS S3 (INT-002) to generate pre-signed URLs for avatar upload. Store profile data.
acceptance_criteria: Profile data retrievable and updatable; avatar upload generates valid S3 pre-signed URL; file stored with private ACL.

tasks.title: Implement Task CRUD and Completion endpoints
tasks.description: Create POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH endpoints for tasks. Enforce ownership checks. Store task details including due date and priority.
acceptance_criteria: Tasks created, updated, deleted, and marked complete only by owners; non-owners receive 403 error.

tasks.title: Implement Task Filtering and Search logic
tasks.description: Enhance GET /api/tasks to support query parameters for status, priority, date range, and text search on title/description.
acceptance_criteria: API returns tasks matching all provided filters; search is case-insensitive and partial.

tasks.title: Implement Task Sharing and Collaboration endpoints
tasks.description: Create POST /api/tasks/:id/share to link tasks to other users. Create POST /api/tasks/:id/comments for adding comments. Trigger notifications.
acceptance_criteria: Task shared successfully with recipient; comment added with timestamp; notification triggered.

tasks.title: Implement Auth Middleware and Authorization Logic
tasks.description: Create Express middleware to validate JWT tokens. Implement logic to check user ownership for task operations.
acceptance_criteria: Protected routes reject requests without valid token; unauthorized users cannot modify others' tasks.

tasks.title: Build Registration and Login Forms
tasks.description: Create React components for user registration and login. Implement form validation and API integration for auth endpoints.
acceptance_criteria: Forms submit data to backend; success redirects to dashboard; errors displayed for invalid input.

tasks.title: Build Password Reset UI
tasks.description: Create UI for requesting password reset and entering new password. Integrate with backend reset endpoints.
acceptance_criteria: User can request reset and set new password; success message shown upon completion.

tasks.title: Build User Profile and Avatar Upload
tasks.description: Create profile view and edit form. Implement S3 pre-signed URL flow for avatar upload.
acceptance_criteria: User can update name/preferences; avatar uploads to S3 and displays correctly.

tasks.title: Build Task List, Create, and Edit Views
tasks.description: Create task list component with create/edit modals. Implement form fields for title, description, due date, priority.
acceptance_criteria: Users can create, view, edit, and delete tasks; form validation prevents invalid data submission.

tasks.title: Implement Task Filtering and Search UI
tasks.description: Add filter controls (status, priority, date) and search bar to task list. Update API calls with query params.
acceptance_criteria: Filtering and searching update the task list dynamically; results match backend logic.

tasks.title: Build Task Sharing and Commenting UI
tasks.description: Create share dialog to select users and comment section for tasks. Display shared tasks and comments.
acceptance_criteria: Users can share tasks and add comments; shared tasks and comments render correctly.

tasks.title: Develop Unit Tests for Auth and User Services
tasks.description: Write Jest tests for registration, login, password reset, and profile endpoints covering success and failure cases.
acceptance_criteria: All unit tests pass with >90% code coverage for auth modules.

tasks.title: Develop Integration Tests for Task and Collaboration
tasks.description: Write integration tests for task CRUD, filtering, sharing, and commenting flows using test database.
acceptance_criteria: Integration tests pass for all task and collaboration endpoints.

tasks.title: Execute Performance and Security Testing
tasks.description: Run load tests for 1000 concurrent users (NFR-001) and verify API response times (NFR-002). Verify bcrypt hashing and HTTPS (NFR-004, NFR-005).
acceptance_criteria: System handles 1000 users with <1% error rate; 95% of requests <200ms; security scan passes.

tasks.title: Setup AWS Infrastructure and CI/CD Pipeline
tasks.description: Configure EC2, RDS, S3, and SendGrid. Setup CI/CD pipeline for automated testing and deployment. Enforce HTTPS.
acceptance_criteria: Infrastructure provisioned; pipeline deploys code on commit; HTTPS enforced; uptime monitoring active.

tasks.title: Configure Database Migrations and Backups
tasks.description: Set up automated migration scripts and daily backup strategy for PostgreSQL RDS instance.
acceptance_criteria: Migrations run automatically on deploy; backups verified and restorable.
